case_title: COLES, DANIEL VS DARDEN, CHRISTOPHER L. C/O MERCURY INSURANCE CO. et al

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-20-2002, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-18-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLES, DANIEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DARDEN, CHRISTOPHER L. C/O MERCURY INSURANCE CO. CERTIFIED MAILING TO MERCURY INSURANCE CO. RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
